svg.text: PySpark 作业优化 | 第4步：已确认热点与观察项
左侧：完整源码和行号。右侧：Spark UI 中可直接观测到的已确认热点；不能直接确认的部分只保留为观察项。
优化顺序：先调 Spark 参数 -> 再改实现方式且不改业务逻辑 -> 最后才考虑改业务逻辑。
ascore 主流程源码，包含 130 天历史扫描、多个聚合 / pivot 分支、WOE 转换和最终写表。

# !!!! However the data for 2024-01-01 is not available at the day of 2024-01-01
# !!!! though the pt_date based on the table date which is the previous month end as the loan features
# !!!! however the customer come in one month later, therefore the mob need to be plus 1

# define the feature date as the pt date to join with feature tables
# join with features for loan status
# only keep the model final features on balance amount
fts_fillna = [ft for ft in sdf_sample_loanstatus.columns if "ft" in ft]
# Assign groupID of -2 to values that not shown in the training sample
woe_all = transformer_woe_dict[ifeature].replace(' THEN', ' WHEN').replace(' END AS', ' WHEN').split(' WHEN ')[2::2]
woe_worst = max([float(i) for i in woe_all])
transformer_woe_dict[ifeature] = temp[0] + f'WHEN ({ifeature} = -2) THEN {woe_worst} END AS' + temp[1]
ftCols = [icol for icol in sdf_sample_loanstatus.columns if icol.startswith('ft_')]
idCols = [icol for icol in sdf_sample_loanstatus.columns if icol not in [labelCol] + ftCols]
# Add "_woe" at the end of column names starting with "ft_"
else F.col(col_name) for col_name in sdf_loanstatus_woe.columns])

Stage 65 运行 33.0 小时，11251 个任务；输入 739.2
这段把 130 天 DPD 明细先按月聚合，再按 client_no + pt_date
pivot 成宽表，随后又继续生成多组百分比列，宽表和 shuffle 压力都被放大。
高：如果收敛到最终保留的 DPD 列，或先按天 / 按月落中间表，可以显著减少宽表展开和后续
shuffle，收益通常是小时级到十几小时级。
*[generate_ever_dpd(d, num_month, dpd).alias(f"ft_has_{dpd}_{num_month}m") for num_month in [1, 2, 3] for dpd in
for num_month in [1, 2, 3] for dpd in ["xdpd", "7dpd", "15dpd", "30dpd"]],
f"ft_count_{dpd}_change_ratio_{num_month}m") for num_month in [1, 2, 3] for dpd in
for num_month in [1, 2, 3] for dpd in ["xdpd", "7dpd", "15dpd", "30dpd"]],
f"ft_pct_{dpd}_change_ratio_{num_month}m") for num_month in [1, 2, 3] for dpd in
Stage 76 运行 51.4 小时，200 个任务；shuffle read 1314.0
GiB，平均每个 task 读取约 6.6 GiB。
这段从 DPD 月度聚合继续展开成 ever / count / pct 三组特征，并通过多次
select + join 叠加成宽表，处理量远高于最终保留列。
高：如果只生成最终 ft_keep 需要的 DPD 特征，或把中间结果做持久化 /
中间表，能减少大量列级计算和宽表 shuffle，收益通常是小时级。
WHERE tt2.pt_date >= tt1.start_date and tt2.pt_date < tt1.end_date
"""# take the latest record for each loan
# to deal with the month that do not have data
Stage 2 运行 9.5 分钟，536/536 tasks；对应申请表日期展开和 pivot
源码上是 130 天扫描后的日期展开 + groupBy + pivot，而且最终没有进入
ft_keep，属于高成本未消费链路。
高：整条分支如果删除，可以少掉一条扫描、展开、shuffle 和 pivot
链路，收益通常是分钟级到十几分钟级。
# 删除 loan application 分支
# transpose to client_no level and pivot by pt_date
Stage 116 运行 23.3 小时，200 个任务；shuffle read 446.5
同一个 base scan 再做一次 dropDuplicates + groupBy +
pivot，后续生成 24 个候选特征，但最终只保留 2 个 raw 特征。
中高：若只保留最终输出所需的 disbursement
特征，可以减少一整段重复聚合和列展开，收益通常是十分钟到半小时级。

svg.text: TOP5 | 760 | final count() 再次触发全量执行

g.text: # for previous month end xdpd, We are not gonna score it therefore, assign null values to xdpd previous month end customers
count job 21 运行 19 分钟，读取 1.7605 TiB 输入；后续
saveAsTable 还继续拉长总时长。
count() 是 action，会把 final dataframe 重新跑一遍，和后面的
write 一起形成重复 lineage。
高：如果把 row count 前移到更早的稳定阶段，或先缓存 final
dataframe，可避免至少一次全量 DAG 重跑；按 1.7605 TiB 输入和 19
分钟计，收益至少是十几分钟到数十分钟级。
# 或者先 persist final dataframe 再 count/write

svg.text: 辅助文件：WOE 映射加载、字符串解析和列级表达式转换。

icol not in [labelCol] + excludeCols and icol in self.transformer_bin_dict]
spark_transformer_woe = [F.expr(self.transformer_woe_dict[icol]) for icol in sdf.columns if
icol not in [labelCol] + excludeCols and icol in self.transformer_woe_dict]

svg.text: 辅助文件：Spark 会话配置、写出和读取辅助函数。

g.text: spark util function for id bank environment
from pyspark.sql import SQLContext, HiveContext, SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.types import IntegerType, FloatType, StringType, BooleanType, DateType
# Added 2023-05-22 due to new queue created for reg risk users
# 'spark.submit.deployMode' : 'cluster', # parameter not present in shopee and throws an error when used
# spark default config updated with specified config_dict
function to build spark session with object parameters
note: run self.kill() to stop session
function to write a single partition
as parquet file from spark dataframe
:param parquet_dir: str() of hdfs directory containing partitions
:param partition_info: dict() of {partition_key : value} to write to,
:param n_partition: int() of number of partitions within partition
# cache partition keys present in spark dataframe
# drop partition keys present in spark dataframe
function to write parquet file from spark dataframe
:param sdf: spark dataframe in spark session
:param partition_cols: list() of str() of column names
:param n_partition: int() of number of partitions
function to read parquet to spark dataframe
function to drop table in database
function to write parquet table from hdfs to db
:param partition_cols: list() of str() of column names
function to show partitions in db.table
